name: Normalize a Wide Table to 3NF
description: Create normalized tables from a denormalized staging table

checks.name: All four tables exist
checks.query: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'main' AND table_name IN ('customers','products','stores','orders') ORDER BY table_name;
checks.description: Expected 4 tables: customers, orders, products, stores

checks.name: Correct row counts
checks.query: SELECT 'customers' AS t, COUNT(*) AS n FROM customers UNION ALL SELECT 'products', COUNT(*) FROM products UNION ALL SELECT 'stores', COUNT(*) FROM stores UNION ALL SELECT 'orders', COUNT(*) FROM orders ORDER BY t;

checks.name: No duplicates in customers
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) = COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS no_dupes FROM customers;
checks.description: customers table should have no duplicate customer_ids

checks.name: Referential integrity: all order customer_ids exist in customers
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM orders o WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customers c WHERE c.customer_id = o.customer_id);
checks.description: All customer_ids in orders must exist in customers
